title: WorkflowScheduleInput
description: The inputs of a durable schedule run (#896). A schedule is a durable run of the built-in scheduler workflow that, on each occurrence of its cadence, starts a run of a target workflow; this is that scheduler run's inputs, persisted with the run and read on every resume.

scheduleId.description: The schedule's stable identity, distinct from the run id. It is part of each fire's idempotency key so two schedules firing at the same instant do not collide.

cron.description: The cron expression driving occurrences: a 5-field standard expression, or a 6-field expression with a leading seconds field when includeSeconds is true.

timeZone.description: The IANA time zone id the cadence is expressed in, so a calendar cadence stays correct across daylight-saving transitions. Defaults to UTC.

includeSeconds.description: Whether the cron expression carries a leading seconds field.

targetWorkflowId.description: The versioned workflow id ({base}-v{n}) each occurrence starts a run of.

targetInputs.description: The inputs each occurrence's target run starts with. Any JSON value, or absent to start the target with no inputs.
